text.title: Elicitation Techniques Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply this methodology end-to-end. Each step names inputs, actions, outputs, and optional decision-gates.

step.name: classify-info-needs
step.action: Tag each need as sme-deep / consensus-needs / broad-preference / process-observe / artefact-analysis.

step.name: schedule-sessions
step.action: Book calendar holds; capture participant confirmations.

step.name: execute-and-capture
step.action: Run sessions; capture notes with timestamps + attendees.
